title: EJP Soil - EnergyLink: Report and data set on extracellular enzyme activities
author: König, Alexander
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This Report provides information on the complete dataset of Task 5.3. This task (led by Katharina Keiblinger) is dedicated to the measurement of specific extracellular enzyme activities. 
 Details on the sample preparation procedures are presented, as well as analysis of enzyme activities. Finally, a list with the sampling protocol as well and overview of the final data set is provided in accordance to data management rules.
steps_raw:
This Report provides information on the complete dataset of Task 5.3. This task (led by Katharina Keiblinger) is dedicated to the measurement of specific extracellular enzyme activities.
